title: oxera neriifolia subsp. cordifolia
intro: Oxera neriifolia subsp. cordifolia, also known as the Heart-leaf Oxera, is a plant species belonging to the Lamiaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The Heart-leaf Oxera is said to offer several health benefits, including reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Oxera neriifolia subsp. cordifolia include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made from its leaves and used to promote overall well-being.
